calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On 2nd Amended Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: G. Cat Stokes appearing for and with executrix Joanne Griffin. Court is not imposing sanctions today. Court will allow the accounting. Court will prepare the order. The order will show that Darlene Curray owns the estate $7,360.00. No extraordniary fees are allowed. Counsel's statutory fees will be reduced by amount owed to Gerald. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Amended Petition
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: G. Cat Stokes appearing for the administrator. At 9:04am, the administrator is not in court. Counsel requests to have the matter passed until the administrator is here.
At 10:21am, G. Cat Stokes appearing for and with the administrator Joanne Griffin. Counsel will file the 2nd amended accounting today. Court will set it for hearing on 10/23. If the proper 2nd amended accounting is not ready to be heard on 10/23, Court will impose a $25.00 surcharge per day until there is a proper accounting. This OSC is vacated. Court will issue another OSC for a proper 2nd amended accounting. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE Amended Petition
